parameters.name: name
parameters.description: device name or part of a name

parameters.name: show_targets
parameters.description:
show_targets true: Returns the details of devices that can be selected as a target in Access Request tickets
show_targets false: Returns the details of devices with objects that can be used in tickets

operations.summary: Returns IDs for specified list of excluded parent management devices and child firewalls in SecureChange
operations.notes:
For example on this Panorama hierarchy:
DG1 - Excluded
  DG1.1
    FW1
    FW2
    FW3

Calling this API with false value will return only DG1's id.
Calling this API with true value will return DG1, FW1, FW2, FW3 id's.

parameters.name: show_all
parameters.description:
When set to true - Displays the specified devices and all their child firewalls in the hierarchy, which will be excluded implicitly.
When set to false - Displays only the devices which were explicitly excluded.
Default value is false.

operations.summary: Update the whole list of excluded devices in SecureChange
Get suggested targets for a given access request
operations.notes: Returns a list of suggested targets for a given access request, based on topology calculations.

responseMessages.message: User does not have permissions to domain or domain does not exist
